{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54778", "cvss": {"score": 6.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-362", "name": "Concurrent Execution using Shared Resource with Improper Synchronization ('Race Condition')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-825", "name": "Expired Pointer Dereference"}], "description": "### Impact
Race condition in POSIX peer identity resolution may attribute one connection’s identity to another (getpwuid/getgrgid non-reentrant) and may crash the host process under contention.

### Patches
Fixed in CoreWCF v1.8.1 and v1.9.1

### Workarounds
Restrict UDS filesystem permissions so that only trusted local users can connect to the socket path. The race still exists but the attacker pool is constrained.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.001, "percentile": 0.01022}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q6v9-43v5-jv9q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T20:46:58Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q6v9-43v5-jv9q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q6v9-43v5-jv9q"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54778"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T20:46:58Z", "references": ["https://github.com/CoreWCF/CoreWCF/security/advisories/GHSA-q6v9-43v5-jv9q", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q6v9-43v5-jv9q"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/CoreWCF/CoreWCF/security-advisories/GHSA-q6v9-43v5-jv9q", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/CoreWCF/CoreWCF", "summary": "CoreWCF: UnixDomainSocket Non-Reentrant POSIX Identity Resolution", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T20:46:59Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q6v9-43v5-jv9q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.8.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "CoreWCF.UnixDomainSocket"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.8.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "1.9.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "CoreWCF.UnixDomainSocket"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.9.0, < 1.9.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: CoreWCF: UnixDomainSocket Non-Reentrant POSIX Identity Resolution
